hibernate-mapping.query: select employeeUsage from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EmployeeUsage as employeeUsage, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.UsagePeriod as usagePeriod, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyUsage companyUsage, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company company where employeeUsage.UsagePeriod = usagePeriod and usagePeriod.CompanyUsage = companyUsage and companyUsage.SourceCompanyId = company.SourceCompanyId and usagePeriod.StartDate = :startDate and usagePeriod.EndDate = :endDate and company.FedTaxIdEnc in (:fedTaxIdEncList) and employeeUsage.SourceEmployeeId = :sourceEmployeeId

select employeeUsage from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EmployeeUsage as employeeUsage, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.UsagePeriod as usagePeriod, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyUsage companyUsage, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company company where employeeUsage.UsagePeriod = usagePeriod and usagePeriod.CompanyUsage = companyUsage and companyUsage.SourceCompanyId = company.SourceCompanyId and usagePeriod.StartDate = :startDate and usagePeriod.EndDate = :endDate and company.FedTaxIdEnc in (:fedTaxIdEncList) and employeeUsage.SourceEmployeeId = :sourceEmployeeId and employeeUsage.Id <> :employeeUsageId

select employeeUsage from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EmployeeUsage as employeeUsage, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.UsagePeriod as usagePeriod, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyUsage as companyUsage, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as company, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as employee, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.QbdtEmployeeInfo as qbdtEmployeeInfo where employeeUsage.UsagePeriod = usagePeriod and usagePeriod.CompanyUsage = companyUsage and companyUsage.SourceCompanyId = company.SourceCompanyId and usagePeriod.CompanyUsage = companyUsage and employee.Company = company and qbdtEmployeeInfo.Employee = employee and qbdtEmployeeInfo.ListId = employeeUsage.SourceEmployeeId and usagePeriod.StartDate = :startDate and usagePeriod.EndDate = :endDate and company.FedTaxIdEnc in (:fedTaxIdEncList) and lower(COALESCE(cast(trim(employee.FirstName) as java.lang.String),''))= :firstName and lower(COALESCE(cast(trim(employee.LastName) as java.lang.String),'')) = :lastName

select employeeUsage from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EmployeeUsage as employeeUsage, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.UsagePeriod as usagePeriod, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyUsage as companyUsage, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as company, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as employee, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.QbdtEmployeeInfo as qbdtEmployeeInfo where employeeUsage.UsagePeriod = usagePeriod and usagePeriod.CompanyUsage = companyUsage and companyUsage.SourceCompanyId = company.SourceCompanyId and usagePeriod.CompanyUsage = companyUsage and employee.Company = company and qbdtEmployeeInfo.Employee = employee and qbdtEmployeeInfo.ListId = employeeUsage.SourceEmployeeId and usagePeriod.StartDate = :startDate and usagePeriod.EndDate = :endDate and company.FedTaxIdEnc in (:fedTaxIdEncList) and lower(COALESCE(cast(trim(employee.FirstName) as java.lang.String),''))= :firstName and lower(COALESCE(cast(trim(employee.LastName) as java.lang.String),'')) = :lastName and employeeUsage.Id <> :employeeUsageId
